title: sauropus quadrangularis var. compressus
intro: Sauropus quadrangularis var. compressus, also known as Lakshmi Vilasam or Lakshmi Vilas, is a variant of the Sauropus quadrangularis plant, which belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae and is a type of succulent plant. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Sauropus quadrangularis var. compressus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and aid in the management of diabetes. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, and is also used as an ingredient in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
